plan_metadata.name: group  validation repairs usingPython in playground

steps.description: Click on the "Type a message..." text input field at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface.
Type text into the input field labeled "Type a message…" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface: 'get repairs assign Karin'.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the command entered in the input field at the bottom of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" interface.
@assertion the bot's response contains confirmation of successful retrieval for Karin’s assigned repairs
